title: Song Twisting Guide
description: How to weave multiple songs as a bard on Quarm. Covers 2, 3, and 4-song twisting, timing, melody macros, and essential songs.

title: Song Rotations
description: What to twist at each level range. Recommended song loadouts for leveling, grouping, and raiding.

title: Charm Kiting
description: Solo charm kiting techniques for bards. How to charm, position, and maximize XP solo.

title: Epic 1.0 — Singing Short Sword
description: Complete walkthrough for the bard epic 1.0 quest. Step by step guide to obtaining the Singing Short Sword.

title: Leveling Guide
description: Best leveling path for bards on Quarm. Zones, quests, and strategies by level range.

title: Vah Shir Cloak Quest
description: Complete guide to Shar Vahl cloak quests for all five Vah Shir classes. Citizenship through Garrison cloak.

title: Song Calculator
description: Bard song modifier and stacking calculator. Select your gear, AAs, and instruments to see song values.
